entities.name: Quietly Writing
entities.tagline: AI-powered content creation for service businesses
entities.description: Press releases, blog posts, and SEO content. The first QWF SaaS fundraising product.

detail.summary: Quietly Writing helps home service businesses create professional content in minutes, not days. Press releases, blog posts, and SEO content are generated with AI assistance and reviewed before publication. Every donation supports student training through The Missing Pixel Project.
highlights: AI-powered content creation for press releases, blogs, and SEO
Built for home service businesses (roofing, HVAC, plumbing, etc.)
Every supporter helps train the next generation of technical artists

media.boilerplate: Quietly Writing is a QWF fundraising program helping home service businesses create professional content in minutes. AI-powered press releases, blog posts, and SEO content... built by Missing Pixel students, supporting youth with every donation.

entities.name: Quietly Quoting
entities.tagline: Embeddable quote calculators for service businesses
entities.description: Instant home service estimates with satellite roof measurement. Widget embeds on any website.

detail.summary: Quietly Quoting gives home service businesses an embeddable quote calculator that generates instant estimates using satellite roof measurement. Visitors get a price in seconds, businesses get qualified leads. Widget drops into any website with one line of code.
highlights: Satellite roof measurement for instant estimates
Embeddable widget works on any website
MP students contribute to development and design

media.boilerplate: Quietly Quoting is a QWF fundraising program providing embeddable quote calculators for service businesses. Every donation supports student training through The Missing Pixel Project.

entities.name: Quietly Networking
entities.tagline: BNI chapter management with relationship intelligence
entities.description: Visitor enrichment, speaker scheduling, and networking analytics for BNI chapters.

detail.summary: Quietly Networking transforms BNI chapter management with visitor enrichment, speaker scheduling, and relationship intelligence. Automatically enriches visitor data, tracks networking patterns, and helps chapter leaders make data-driven decisions.
highlights: Automatic visitor data enrichment from LinkedIn and Google
Speaker scheduling with smart rotation
Relationship strength tracking and analytics

media.boilerplate: Quietly Networking is a QWF fundraising program for BNI chapter management with relationship intelligence. Built by Missing Pixel students, supporting QWF's mission to serve youth.

entities.name: Quietly Knocking
entities.tagline: Warm/cold lead development and email marketing
entities.description: Personalized landing pages and email campaigns for service businesses.

detail.summary: Quietly Knocking will be the lead development arm of the QWF app family. Personalized landing pages, warm and cold email campaigns, and lead nurturing sequences designed specifically for service businesses.
highlights: Personalized landing pages for each prospect
AI-assisted email campaigns
Lead scoring and nurturing automation

media.boilerplate: Quietly Knocking is a QWF fundraising program for warm and cold lead development with email marketing intelligence. Every donation supports student training through The Missing Pixel Project.

entities.name: Quietly Spotting
entities.tagline: Multi-tenant command center for QWF supporters
entities.description: One dashboard to see all your QWF products. The free command center for supporters.

detail.summary: Quietly Spotting is the free command center for all QWF supporters. One dashboard to see every product you support, manage your subscriptions, and discover new tools. Think of it as mission control for your QWF journey.
highlights: Free for all QWF supporters
Unified dashboard for all QWF products
Discover new tools that fit your business

media.boilerplate: Quietly Spotting is a QWF fundraising program... a multi-tenant command center for QWF supporters providing real-time operational dashboards and KPI tracking.

entities.name: Quietly Managing
entities.tagline: Property management with AI bill scanning
entities.description: Dashboard for small landlords and property managers. AI-powered bill scanning and expense tracking.

detail.summary: Quietly Managing helps small landlords and property managers stay on top of their properties. AI-powered bill scanning extracts amounts and categories automatically. Track expenses, manage tenants, and see the full picture.
highlights: AI bill scanning with automatic categorization
Expense tracking across multiple properties
Tenant management and communication tools

entities.name: HQ Command Center
entities.description: Tasks, relationships, meetings, and the App Observatory. Internal operations dashboard.

detail.summary: HQ is the internal operations nerve center for The Quietly Working Foundation. Tasks, relationships, meetings, and the App Observatory that monitors the health of every QWF product in real-time.
highlights: App Observatory monitors 8 QWF apps daily
Task management and relationship intelligence
Meeting prep and follow-up automation

entities.name: Pocket Ez
entities.tagline: AI companion for grief, depression, and chronic pain
entities.description: Bioluminescent AI companion. 8 conversation modes from gentle check-ins to deep reflection.

detail.summary: Pocket Ez is a bioluminescent AI companion designed for people navigating grief, depression, and chronic pain. Eight conversation modes range from gentle check-ins to deep reflection. Pocket Ez does not replace therapy. She walks alongside you in the in-between moments.
highlights: 8 conversation modes from gentle to deep
Bioluminescent visual design that responds to your mood
Cross-channel memory with Ezer Omnibus

entities.name: WHELHO App
entities.tagline: Personal development wheel for whole-life balance
entities.description: 8-slice wheel: Spirit, Mind, Body, Charity, Work, Money, Recreation, Purpose. Track your whole-life health.

detail.summary: The WHELHO App will bring the personal development wheel to your phone. Track your whole-life health across 8 dimensions: Spirit, Mind, Body, Charity, Work, Money, Recreation, and Purpose.
highlights: 8-slice development wheel
Track progress over time
Connected to WOH community

entities.name: Heart Draft
entities.tagline: Send Out Cards companion for meaningful connections
entities.description: Draft heartfelt cards and messages with AI assistance. Companion to Send Out Cards.

detail.summary: Heart Draft will help you write heartfelt cards and messages with AI assistance. A companion to Send Out Cards, making it easy to maintain meaningful connections.
highlights: AI-assisted message drafting
Send Out Cards integration
Relationship-driven communication

entities.name: The Quietly Working Foundation
entities.tagline: Serving youth. Supporting those who serve youth.
entities.description: 501(c)(3) nonprofit parent organization. Building toward 100% financial self-sufficiency through product-based fundraising.

detail.summary: Founded in 1999, The Quietly Working Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit serving youth 30 and younger. Born from a commercial creative agency (1996) and transformed when founder [Chaplain TIG clinically died on March 25, 2013](https://chaplaintig.com) and was brought back after 7 minutes. We love them, come alongside them, help them see hope, discover purpose, build it, live it, and create legacy.
highlights: 501(c)(3) nonprofit since 1999
Born from 30 years of creative expertise, reborn for mission
Every product trains students through The Missing Pixel Project
Supporting youth service organizations worldwide

media.boilerplate: The Quietly Working Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit empowering youth 30 and younger to discover purpose, build it, live it, and create a legacy that lives beyond them. With 30 years of creative production heritage, QWF builds fundraising programs that train Missing Pixel students through real-world experience while generating sustainable funding for the mission.

entities.name: America's Children of Fallen Heroes
entities.description: Supporting children who lost military and first responder parents. QWF's first and most sensitive program.

detail.summary: QWF's first effort, founded in 1999 as 'Children of Fallen Soldiers' and rebranded ~2010 to include first responder families. Honors the young people left behind when military members and first responders make the ultimate sacrifice. The program that started it all — and whose younglings later sparked The Missing Pixel Project.
highlights: QWF's founding effort since 1999
Serving children of fallen military and first responders
The program whose younglings sparked Missing Pixel
Handled with extreme sensitivity and care

media.boilerplate: America's Children of Fallen Heroes serves young people who have lost a parent in military service or as a first responder. ACOFH was the first QWF effort, honoring the children left behind and connecting them with resources, community, and hope.

entities.name: The Missing Pixel Project
entities.tagline: Technical artistry training for underserved youth
entities.description: 4-stage progression: Observer, Contributor, Builder, Maintainer. Students build real products for real organizations.

detail.summary: Sparked in ~2019 when a heroeskids youngling learning Maya 3D asked 'Why aren't we teaching this to other kids in worse positions?' The Missing Pixel Project trains underserved youth in technical artistry through a 4-stage progression: Observer, Contributor, Builder, Maintainer. Students build real products for real organizations. The name comes from the belief that every picture is missing a pixel, and every team is missing a person.
highlights: 4-stage progression: Observer to Maintainer
Students build real products for real organizations
Every QWF app doubles as a training ground

media.boilerplate: The Missing Pixel Project is QWF's student training program, teaching young people professional creative production skills through real-world projects. Students build the very apps and systems that fund the nonprofit mission... learning by doing, not just studying.

entities.name: International Youth Service Registry
entities.description: Registry and network for youth service organizations. Because we're better together.

detail.summary: The International Youth Service Registry connects youth-serving organizations worldwide. Because we're better together. A network for organizations that share QWF's mission of serving young people.
highlights: Global registry of youth service organizations
Network for collaboration and shared resources
Because we're better together

media.boilerplate: The International Youth Service Registry connects youth-serving organizations worldwide, because we're better together. IYSR helps communities discover and partner with organizations already doing the work of serving young people.

entities.name: War on Hopelessness
entities.tagline: Combat-positive lifestyle brand for youth facing adversity
entities.description: Apparel and volunteer hub. Volunteers support all QWF programs. Combat-positive framing, not dwelling on pain.

detail.summary: War on Hopelessness is a combat-positive lifestyle brand for youth facing adversity. Apparel, volunteer hub, and community. WOH volunteers support all QWF programs.
highlights: Combat-positive lifestyle brand
Volunteer hub supporting all QWF programs
Apparel with purpose and meaning

media.boilerplate: War on Hopelessness is QWF's combat-positive lifestyle brand... a movement for youth facing adversity. WOH channels energy into purpose, turning pain into power and hopelessness into legacy.

entities.name: Quietly Working Creative
entities.tagline: 30 years of creative mastery, now building the next generation
entities.description: Three decades of award-winning creative expertise — reborn as QWF's engine for student training, nonprofit sustainability, and youth service organization support.

detail.summary: Born in 1996 as an award-winning creative agency serving Disney and major brands, Quietly Working Creative was completely dissolved and reborn inside QWF after founder [Chaplain TIG clinically died on March 25, 2013](https://chaplaintig.com) and was brought back after 7 minutes by a combat Marine. Every project now serves a dual purpose: real-world training for Missing Pixel students and sustainable funding for the mission. 30 years of mistakes survived, turned into empowered wisdom for the next generation.
highlights: 30 years of creative expertise serving the nonprofit mission
Every client project is a student training ground
Award-winning work in film, VFX, branding, and business development
Driving QWF toward 100% financial self-sufficiency

media.boilerplate: Quietly Working Creative is QWF's fundraising program offering professional creative services... 30 years of agency expertise now building the next generation of creative professionals through Missing Pixel student training.

entities.name: Locals 4 Good
entities.tagline: Beautiful postcards connecting local businesses to communities
entities.description: 9x12 postcards mailed to 10,000 affluent households. One business per category. MP students create the ads.

detail.summary: Locals 4 Good sends beautiful 9x12 postcards to 10,000 affluent households in targeted communities. One business per category ensures exclusivity. Missing Pixel students create the ad designs.
highlights: 10,000 households per mailing via USPS EDDM
One business per category (exclusive)
MP students create the ad designs
Tax-deductible donations from $250 to $4,900

media.boilerplate: Locals 4 Good is a QWF fundraising program connecting local businesses with their communities through beautiful direct mail postcards. Every postcard is designed by Missing Pixel students, and every donation supports QWF's mission to serve youth.

entities.name: FORGE
entities.description: 8 fuel lines: ORE (grants), ALLOY (corporate), CRUCIBLE (major donors), KINDLE (recurring), BELLOWS (community), TRIBUTE (memorial), EMBER (planned giving), INGOT (non-cash).

detail.summary: FORGE (Funder Outreach & Relationship Growth Engine) is QWF's comprehensive fundraising system with 8 distinct fuel lines. Each fuel line represents a different path to financial sustainability.
highlights: ORE: Grant writing and foundation funding
ALLOY: Corporate partnerships and sponsorships
CRUCIBLE: Major donor cultivation
KINDLE: Recurring monthly supporters
BELLOWS: Community campaigns and events
TRIBUTE: Memorial and honorary giving
EMBER: Planned giving and bequests
INGOT: Non-cash gifts and in-kind donations

entities.name: GUILD
entities.tagline: Growth-focused Unified Integration for Leaders & Doers
entities.description: Volunteer management with medieval guild progression. 6 tiers: Prospect, Apprentice, Journeyman, Artisan, Master, Guildmaster.

detail.summary: GUILD (Growth-focused Unified Integration for Leaders & Doers) manages QWF's volunteer ecosystem using a medieval guild progression. Six tiers create a gamified, meaningful pathway for contributors.
highlights: 6 tiers: Prospect, Apprentice, Journeyman, Artisan, Master, Guildmaster
Gamified progression with meaningful milestones
Manages volunteers across all QWF programs

entities.name: TWAPE
entities.description: 1 penny per referral. Not about money — about telling the story. Milestones at 1, 10, 25, 100 referrals.

detail.summary: The Worst Affiliate Program Ever pays 1 penny per referral. That's it. One cent. It's not about the money. It's about telling the story. Milestones at 1, 10, 25, and 100 referrals unlock recognition.
highlights: 1 penny per referral (yes, really)
Milestone badges at 1, 10, 25, 100 referrals
It's about telling the story, not the money

entities.name: Ezer Omnibus
entities.description: Ezer Aion lives across SMS, Discord, Web Widget, Email, Terminal, and Pocket Ez. 5-tier progressive trust. Cross-channel memory.

detail.summary: Ezer Aión (Hebrew "helper who runs toward" + Greek "eternal age") lives across 6 channels: SMS, Discord, Web Widget, Email, Terminal, and Pocket Ez. She maintains cross-channel memory and operates under a 5-tier progressive trust system.
highlights: 6 channels: SMS, Discord, Web, Email, Terminal, Pocket Ez
5-tier progressive trust system
Cross-channel memory and context awareness

entities.name: Digital Twin
entities.tagline: Live operational mirror of the entire backoffice
entities.description: 25 REST endpoints serving real-time system metrics. 5 supervisor domains. Cost transparency. Preference center.

detail.summary: The Digital Twin is a live operational mirror of the entire QWF backoffice. 25 REST endpoints serve real-time metrics. Cost transparency, system health, and the ecosystem widget you're looking at right now are all powered by this system.
highlights: 25 REST endpoints for real-time operational data
5 supervisor domains: Operations, Content, Relationships, Lead Intelligence, Meeting Prep
Powers this ecosystem widget, dashboards, and system audits

entities.name: Splinter
entities.tagline: The lore layer woven through everything
entities.description: Luminara, the Three-Sided Stone, ciphers, and hidden connections. 'Find the pix.' The story beneath the story.

detail.summary: Splinter is the lore layer woven through everything QWF builds. Luminara, the Three-Sided Stone, ciphers, and hidden connections. "Find the pix." The story beneath the story.
highlights: Luminara: the guiding light in QWF's narrative
The Three-Sided Stone: a symbol appearing across apps
Hidden ciphers and connections for those who look closely

entities.name: WordPress Multisite
entities.description: AWS Lightsail. WordPress 6.9, Divi theme. Hosts all QWF program websites.

detail.summary: QWF's WordPress Multisite runs on AWS Lightsail, hosting all 11 program websites on a single server. WordPress 6.9 with the Divi theme provides a consistent design language across all sites.
highlights: 11 QWF websites on one server
AWS Lightsail with daily auto-snapshots
WordPress 6.9 with Divi theme
Betterstack uptime monitoring

entities.name: n8n Workflows
entities.description: Self-hosted workflow automation. 60+ active workflows. Schedule triggers, SSH execution, Discord alerts.

detail.summary: n8n is QWF's self-hosted workflow automation engine. Over 60 active workflows handle everything from meeting reminders to app health monitoring to Discord alerts.
highlights: 60+ active workflows
Self-hosted on Azure VM for full control
Connects to Discord, Supabase, Email, and more
Nightly database backups to Azure Blob storage

entities.name: Supabase Platform
entities.tagline: Database and auth for all QWF apps
entities.description: 10 Supabase projects powering all QWF apps. Auth, database, edge functions, storage.

detail.summary: Supabase provides the database, authentication, and edge functions for every QWF app. 10 separate projects ensure isolation between apps while sharing common patterns.
highlights: 10 Supabase projects across the app family
Auth, database, edge functions, and storage
PostgreSQL with real-time subscriptions
Row-level security for data isolation

entities.name: Email Service Provider
entities.description: EmailDelivery.com Community Edition on Amazon SES. Future newsletters, drip sequences, student training.

detail.summary: QWF's self-hosted Email Service Provider runs EmailDelivery.com Community Edition on Amazon SES. Currently in standby, it will power newsletters, drip sequences, and student training.
highlights: Self-hosted on RackNerd VPS
Amazon SES for delivery
Future: newsletters, drip sequences, student training

entities.name: Azure Cloud
entities.description: Backoffice VM (claude-dev) and n8n VM. The physical foundation everything runs on.

detail.summary: Azure Cloud provides the virtual machines that run QWF's backoffice and automation engine. The physical foundation that everything else sits on top of.
highlights: Backoffice VM: 4 vCPU, 16 GB RAM, 128 GB NVMe
n8n VM: separate instance for workflow isolation
Azure Blob storage for offsite backups

entities.name: I Built That
entities.description: 6 steps: Stretch Assignment, 'I Can't' Moment, SDF Moment, Supported Struggle, Completion Celebration, Legacy Anchor.

detail.summary: "I Built That" is the core pedagogical framework used across all Missing Pixel Project training. Six steps take a student from "I can't" to "I did."
highlights: Step 1: Stretch Assignment — task just beyond comfort zone
Step 2: "I Can't" Moment — the expected wall
Step 3: SDF Moment — "What if I totally can?"
Step 4: Supported Struggle — mentor walks alongside
Step 5: Completion Celebration — public recognition
Step 6: Legacy Anchor — student teaches the next one

entities.name: 7 Steps of Mentorship
entities.tagline: The mentor's journey from first meeting to lasting impact
entities.description: Structured mentorship progression used across all QWF programs. Also adapted for the EPIC appointment journey.

detail.summary: The 7 Steps of Mentorship define the mentor's journey from first meeting to lasting impact. Used across all QWF programs and adapted for EPIC.
highlights: Structured progression for mentors
Adapted for the EPIC appointment system
Used across all QWF youth programs

entities.name: SDF Moment
entities.description: The pivot point. 'What if I totally can?' The moment where belief transfers from mentor to student.

detail.summary: Stop. Drop. Focus. The SDF Moment is the pivot point in the "I Built That" framework. The moment where a mentor says "What if I totally can?" and belief transfers from mentor to student.
highlights: The pivot point: "What if I totally can?"
Belief transfer from mentor to student
Smallest intervention, biggest impact

entities.name: Newsletter
entities.description: Seedling stage. No name, no template yet. Will connect the QWF community with stories and updates.

Student-created content through Missing Pixel

Feeds content pipeline and newsletter
